chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.D-21 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.3159/2023 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.3160/2023 4. For hearing of main case 29.03.2023 Mr. Muhammad Sabir Hussain, advocate for applicant along with applicant. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is stated that applicant is innocent but has been falsely implicated in this case; that the applicant wants to surrender before the trial court but needs protection as he apprehends his arrest on account of issuance of NBWs against him. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for 07 days from today subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. NBWs issued against the applicant shall remain suspended during the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days on 04.04.2023 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
